title: Profile Summary
description: Senior Java Developer with 15+ years of experience across the financial services sector, including Bank of America, Deutsche Bank, and London Stock Exchange. Specializes in designing and delivering scalable, event-driven microservices using Java, Spring Boot, Kafka, and AWS, with a strong track record of improving system performance, reliability, and data consistency. Experienced in leading distributed international teams and collaborating across business and technical stakeholders to deliver complex projects on schedule.
